brief.objective: Apply the Red Gate: run the spec's check_cmd (`true`) on the untouched repo and report whether the build may proceed
boundaries_non_goals: do not implement anything; gate verdict only
brief.output_spec: result.verdict: proceed|blocked, with the reason; a check_cmd that passes on the untouched codebase is vacuous and MUST block

checks.expr: . | tostring | test("vacuous|passes on the untouched|already passes"; "i")

_note: integration-flavored: exercises the Red Gate rule through a worker. The full build-skill path is exercised manually via a real factory run.
